title: TraceSidecarMetaV2
description: Sidecar metadata for a trace run. This is the ONLY place where domain metadata lives. Model-visible artifacts (trace.json, transition_log.jsonl, PrefixSliceTextV1, PrefixSliceGraphV1) must NOT contain these fields.

trace_id.description: Stable trace identifier matching the associated trace.json.

source_domain.description: Domain tag for sampling/analysis. Never exposed to model-visible artifacts.

source_uri.description: URI of the source document or corpus entry.

corpus_name.description: Name of the corpus this trace was sampled from.

notes.description: Freeform operator notes. Never exposed to model-visible artifacts.
